29 Mar 19 BALANCECARRIEDFORWARD 20,735.78
Information about the Financial Services Compensation Scheme
Your deposit is eligible for protection under the Financial Services Compensation Scheme (FSCS).
Interest For foreign currency transactions we will charge a fee of Credit Interest is calculated daily on the cleared credit 2.75
balance and is paid monthly if applicable this fee will be shown as a separate line on your statement as a Non-Sterling Cash Fee 1.75
